text: A comprehensive risk management system must be established and maintained throughout the AI system lifecycle.
label: risk_management

text: The provider shall identify and analyse known and foreseeable risks to health, safety, and fundamental rights.
label: risk_management

text: Residual risks must be evaluated against the risk management framework before deployment of the system.
label: risk_management

text: Risk mitigation measures were implemented to address all identified hazards in the classification module.
label: risk_management

text: The AI system undergoes continuous risk assessment throughout its operational phase.
label: risk_management

text: Safety validation procedures include testing under all reasonably foreseeable conditions of misuse.
label: risk_management

text: Our risk register documents all identified risks with corresponding mitigation strategies and owners.
label: risk_management

text: Periodic reviews of risk controls are conducted at least annually or after any significant change.
label: risk_management

text: Das Risikomanagementsystem muss für alle Hochrisiko-KI-Systeme über den gesamten Lebenszyklus etabliert werden.
label: risk_management

text: Hazard analysis was conducted per IEC 62443 for the AI-based safety-critical decision support system.
label: risk_management

text: Training datasets shall be free from errors, complete, and have appropriate statistical properties.
label: data_governance

text: Data collection procedures ensure demographic representativeness across all relevant user groups.
label: data_governance

text: Bias examination was conducted on the training data prior to model development and feature selection.
label: data_governance

text: Validation and test datasets are kept strictly separate from training data throughout the development pipeline.
label: data_governance

text: Personal data used for training was anonymised in accordance with GDPR Article 25 privacy by design.
label: data_governance

text: Data lineage is documented for all training, validation, and test sets used in the model.
label: data_governance

text: The quality criteria applied to training data include accuracy, completeness, and temporal timeliness.
label: data_governance

text: Examination of training data for biases includes statistical disparity testing across demographic subgroups.
label: data_governance

text: Trainingsdaten müssen frei von Fehlern sein und angemessene statistische Eigenschaften aufweisen.
label: data_governance

text: The data governance framework establishes roles and responsibilities for dataset management and curation.
label: data_governance

text: Technical documentation shall describe the general purpose of the AI system and all intended use cases.
label: technical_documentation

text: System architecture diagrams and component descriptions are maintained in the technical dossier.
label: technical_documentation

text: The design specifications include data flow diagrams, model selection rationale, and hyperparameter choices.
label: technical_documentation

text: Technical documentation covers the entire development lifecycle including training methodology and evaluation.
label: technical_documentation

text: Performance metrics and benchmark results are documented in the technical specifications file.
label: technical_documentation

text: The intended purpose, capabilities, and known limitations are clearly stated in technical documentation.
label: technical_documentation

text: Software version control records and change management logs form part of the technical file.
label: technical_documentation

text: Technische Dokumentation beschreibt die Systemarchitektur und alle wesentlichen Entwicklungsentscheidungen.
label: technical_documentation

text: Component testing results and integration test reports are included in the technical dossier.
label: technical_documentation

text: The technical file documents the methods, steps, and criteria used to validate the AI system.
label: technical_documentation

text: Automatic logging of all AI system operations enables post-deployment audit and traceability capabilities.
label: record_keeping

text: Event logs are retained for the minimum period required to enable regulatory review and investigation.
label: record_keeping

text: The system maintains complete audit trails of all decisions made by the AI component.
label: record_keeping

text: Log files capture input data, output predictions, and confidence scores for each inference event.
label: record_keeping

text: Record keeping procedures ensure full traceability of AI-assisted decisions over their operational lifetime.
label: record_keeping

text: Automated logs include timestamps, user identifiers, and system state at each decision point.
label: record_keeping

text: The audit trail enables reconstruction of the AI system's decision process for any historical event.
label: record_keeping

text: Das Protokollierungssystem zeichnet alle Entscheidungen des KI-Systems mit Zeitstempel automatisch auf.
label: record_keeping

text: Records of training runs, including hyperparameters and evaluation metrics, are permanently preserved.
label: record_keeping

text: System logs are protected from unauthorized modification to ensure the integrity of audit records.
label: record_keeping

text: Deployers must be provided with clear instructions for use and information about system capabilities.
label: transparency

text: The AI system notifies users when they are interacting with an automated decision-making system.
label: transparency

text: Transparency documentation explains the logic underlying AI-generated recommendations to affected persons.
label: transparency

text: Users are informed of the limitations and appropriate use cases of the AI system before deployment.
label: transparency

text: The system provides meaningful explanations for its outputs to affected persons upon request.
label: transparency

text: Instructions for use include information about intended purpose and conditions of appropriate deployment.
label: transparency

text: Transparency obligations require disclosure of the AI nature of the system to all end users.
label: transparency

text: Transparenzanforderungen verlangen klare Informationen über KI-gestützte Entscheidungen für Nutzer.
label: transparency

text: The system provides human-readable explanations alongside all automated recommendations.
label: transparency

text: Deployers receive documentation of the AI system's capabilities, limitations, and validated performance.
label: transparency

text: Human oversight measures enable operators to monitor the AI system during real-time operation.
label: human_oversight

text: The system includes stop and override functionality allowing human intervention at any point.
label: human_oversight

text: Operators are trained to understand the AI system's outputs and to recognise potential anomalies.
label: human_oversight

text: Human review is mandatory before acting on any high-stakes AI-generated recommendation.
label: human_oversight

text: The AI system alerts human supervisors when prediction confidence falls below the defined threshold.
label: human_oversight

text: Oversight procedures ensure humans can disregard AI outputs and take full manual control.
label: human_oversight

text: Regular human audits of AI-generated decisions are conducted to detect systematic errors or drift.
label: human_oversight

text: Menschliche Aufsichtsmaßnahmen ermöglichen die Überwachung und Kontrolle des KI-Systems jederzeit.
label: human_oversight

text: The system supports human-in-the-loop operation for all safety-critical classification decisions.
label: human_oversight

text: Oversight logs record all instances of human intervention and manual overrides of AI decisions.
label: human_oversight

text: The AI system achieves the required level of accuracy for its intended purpose across all test conditions.
label: security

text: Robustness testing confirms the system maintains performance under adversarial input conditions.
label: security

text: Cybersecurity measures protect the AI system against unauthorized access and model manipulation.
label: security

text: Accuracy metrics are documented and validated across diverse demographic groups and edge cases.
label: security

text: The system is hardened against adversarial attacks that could compromise prediction integrity.
label: security

text: Resilience testing covers failure modes including corrupted inputs and infrastructure outages.
label: security

text: Security vulnerability assessments are conducted before deployment and after any significant update.
label: security

text: Genauigkeit und Robustheit des KI-Systems werden kontinuierlich gemessen und bewertet.
label: security

text: The system maintains consistent performance metrics within defined statistical tolerance bounds.
label: security

text: Penetration testing and security audits are conducted per ISO 27001 before production release.
label: security

text: Travel reimbursement requests must be submitted within 30 days of the completed travel date.
label: unrelated

text: The IT helpdesk ticketing system is available around the clock for incident reporting.
label: unrelated

text: Budgetplanung für das nächste Quartal wird in der Sitzung am Montag gemeinsam besprochen.
